title: Hungry Like the Wolf
meaning_summary: Its rhythm and instantly recognizable chorus help the song keep earning through long-tail replay and rediscovery.
revenue_drivers: Streaming and nostalgia playlist use support recurring plays.
Strong cultural familiarity keeps the song easy to rediscover.
Sync and media reuse help sustain commercial visibility.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Hungry Like the Wolf is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
